creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Not a bug, I'm sorry for the noise.

The reason for the massive slowdonw was a misconfiguration of the DNS side: by changing a zone which was responsible for the resolution of the used STUN server, the name of the STUN server couldn't be resolved anymore and so a timeout hit the dialin/dialout process of asterisk.

Thanks to Joshua Colp from digium, who had the correct idea where to look at.
